heatwave.title: Gargadin Zafi
heatwave.advice: Zauna ciki 11am-4pm. Sha ruwa akai-akai. Duba maƙwabtanka tsofaffi.

subscribe.title: Sanarwar SMS
subscribe.success: An yi rijista! Za ku sami sanarwar SMS don {{lga}}.
subscribe.ussd_hint: Babu wayar zamani? Yi kiran *384*FLOOD# a kowane waya.

layers.sar: Faɗaɗar Ambaliya ta Tauraro mai wucewa (SAR)

map.lake_chad: Tafkin Chadi: ~24,500 km² (matakin yanzu mai kwanciyar hankali)

offline.banner: Kuna offline. Ana nuna bayanai na ƙarshe ({{age}} da suka wuce).
offline.cached_maps: Taswirorin ambaliya na offline suna samuwa don LGA 148 mafi haɗari

voice.dual_auth_required: Ana buƙatar izini na jami'ai biyu
voice.red_dual_auth_notice: GARGADI NA TSANANI: Jami'ai biyu dole su amince da wannan gargadi daban-daban.
voice.compose_placeholder: Rubuta gargadin gaggawa a Turanci mai sarari, kai tsaye. Misali: GARGADIN AMBALIYA: HAƊARI SOSAI ga LGA Kogi. Kogi yana ƙaruwa. Tashi daga wuraren ƙasa nan take. Je matsuguni mafi kusa. Kira 08000-NEMA.
voice.compose_guidance_red: GARGADI NA TSANANI: Zama kai tsaye da gaggawa. Haɗa: abin da ya faru, inda yake, abin da za a yi, inda za a je, wanda za a kira.
voice.compose_guidance_orange: HAƊARI SOSAI: Haɗa matakai na aiki da bayanin matsuguni.
voice.compose_guidance_yellow: MATSAKAICI: Haɗa shawarwari da umarnin sa ido.
voice.compose_guidance_green: ƘARAMIN HAƊARI: Faɗakarwa gaba ɗaya da shirye-shiryen damina.
voice.tip_action_first: Fara da aiki (FICEWA / ZAUNA CIKI / SA IDO)
voice.tip_location: Ambaci LGA ko al'umma ta musamman
voice.tip_shelter: Haɗa wuri na matsuguni ko lambar sadarwa ta NEMA
voice.over_limit: Haruffa {{over}} sun wuce iyaka — taƙaita kafin ƙirƙira
voice.loanword_hint: Lura: '{{words}}' za a fassara (ba za a yi amfani da su azaman aro ba a HA/YO/IG)

progress.translating: Mataki na 2: Ana fassara zuwa Hausa, Yarbanci, Igbo, Pidgin…

voice.flagged_for_review: An nuna don dubawa da hannu
voice.waveform_label: Zanen raƙuman sauti — danna don nema
voice.copy_for_radio: Kwafi rubutun don watsa labarai ta rediyo
voice.reject_placeholder: Bayyana dalilin ƙin wannan gargadi (misali matsayin da ba daidai ba, kuskuren fassara, rashin daidaituwar tsanani)…
voice.override_warning: MAƁALLI NA GAGGAWA — Wannan yana wuce duk ƙofofin mulki. Ana buƙatar rahoton bincike bayan lamari a cikin awanni 24.
voice.override_audit_notice: An rubuta wannan aiki har abada kuma ba za a iya sauya shi ba.
voice.override_justification_placeholder: Bayyana dalili na aiki na yin amfani da maɓalli na gaggawa…
voice.override_confirm_check: Na fahimci cewa wannan maɓalli ne na gaggawa kuma na karɓi alhakin rahoton binciken bayan lamari.
voice.dispatched_subtitle: An amince da sauti na harsuna 5 duka kuma an jera su. Ana aika yanzu.
voice.override_dispatched_notice: Ana buƙatar rahoton bincike a cikin awanni 24. Tuntubi manzonku.
voice.dispatch_at_voice: Muryan Africa's Talking (kiran tarho ta atomatik)
voice.dispatch_radio_ftp: Sauke fayil zuwa tashar rediyo ta FTP
voice.audit_report_due: ⚠ Rahoton Binciken Maɓalli na Gaggawa Ya Kai lokaci
